resolution_summary: EXP-539-baby-batch-1.json Patch 3: insert '— each invoking a free dome-specific parameter with no globe-model counterpart —' into the four-WINs sentence in §7.11 WIN-level impact paragraph. Names the shared structural property (free parameter absent from globe model) that makes WIN-017/WIN-026/WIN-056/WIN-065 structurally equivalent to the n(r) unfalsifiability argument.
action_for_decider: apply Patch 3 of EXP-539-baby-batch-1.json to data/sections.json; close ISS-2402
